hero.title:
Phuket Tour Packages
From A to Z.
All Included. Period.
hero.sub: Maximum quality, instant booking, zero compromise. Villas, yachts, cars, concierge — one package. No hidden fees.

philosophy.label: Azanov Retreat Philosophy
philosophy.title:
Forget surcharges.
A to Z — it's not just words.
philosophy.body: While others bus tourists around, we build a personal leisure ecosystem where every detail is already paid for and thought through.
philosophy.quote: The entire island belongs to you alone. We erased the line between desire and reality.

packages.label: Choose yours
packages.title:
Azanov Retreat.
Sorted: from maximum to entry.
packages.body: Every package is a private A-to-Z retreat. Minimum 5 nights. Zero compromise.

fleet.label: Azanov Fleet
fleet.title:
From a speedboat
to a club superyacht.
fleet.body: 109 vessels. Every charter — All-Inclusive: guide, drinks, snorkeling, GoPro, insurance.
fleet.tip: Tip: For groups of 6 or more, private yacht charter beats a group tour on price — and the entire yacht is yours alone.

villas.label: Azanov Private Villas
villas.title:
A home where water
peers through the windows.
villas.body: Premium villa collection — from cozy 4-bedroom retreats to legendary 9-bedroom residences for 28 guests.

tours.label: Azanov — 60+ Routes
tours.title:
Exclusive routes you won't
find in any guidebook.
tours.body: Tailored destinations. Crystal water. Zero tourist buses.
tours.errorLocalServer: Tours block requires a local server.
tours.errorLocalServerLong: The browser blocks data loading when opening the HTML file directly. Please run the project via Live Server or localhost.

concierge.label: Azanov Service
concierge.title:
From Fast Track
to your personal chef.
concierge.body: We eliminated the limits of what's possible. Every service element is available as a standalone option or included in your package.

fasttrack.label: VIP Airport Fast Track
fasttrack.title: Green Lane — for those who value their time
fasttrack.body: Met at the aircraft door, priority passport control with no queues, VIP transfer. For groups of 10+ — premium group bus. The whole process takes 10–15 minutes.

crypto.label: Crypto Exchange
crypto.title: Any crypto to cash — Thailand and worldwide
crypto.body: We'll exchange any cryptocurrency to cash. Best rates from $10,000. For 2.5% of any amount, you get cash almost anywhere in the world.

reviews.label: Guest Stories
reviews.title:
Instead of a thousand words —
genuine emotions.

cta.label: Azanov Retreat — Your Phuket starts here
cta.title:
Ready for your retreat?
We're available 24/7.
cta.body: The concierge will prepare a personal no-hidden-fee proposal within 15 minutes.

footer.tagline:

footer.taglineSmall: For those who choose the maximum

modal.extrasBannerText: All services listed here are available at an additional charge and are not included in the package price. Please contact our team for exact pricing and details — we'll find the perfect option just for you.
